raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX re-opened Best Buy credit card to purchase 2 appliances - purchase total {$1800.00}. I did not receive a new card in the mail. 
XXXX received 3 calls from Best Buy Fraud Dept asking if I had authorized new charges on the card. Explained I did not have a card yet and NO - I did not make any additional charges. The 3rd call from Best Buy Fraud Dept was for an electronics dept charge of {$740.00} - I said I did NOT make this purchase. I also cancelled the original appliance purchase of {$1800.00}. No proof of cancellation was sent to me. 
XXXX contacted Best Buy Fraud Dept to open a fraud case to investigate {$740.00} fraud charge. Cancelled the credit card - Fraud Dept said it would take 60-90 days to investigate - case # XXXX. I was told I would receive a letter confirming the " investigation ''. No letter was received. 
XXXX follow up to Best Buy Fraud Dept. no action - no correspondence. 
XXXX follow up to Best Buy Fraud Dept. no action - no correspondence. 
XXXX received statement from Citi Bank Card Services- past due charges {$300.00} + XXXX contacted XXXX XXXX ( TX Law Firm ) - they sent certified letters to Best Buy & Citi Card Svs no response. They were told they can not work with 3rd parties to claims. 
XXXX XXXX XXXX sent certified letters to Credit Reporting Agencies explaining the Best Buy Fraud I'm XXXX years old and had an excellent credit rating of XXXX - now my score is below XXXX & all my lines of credit have been reduced. My auto insurance ( based on credit score ) has increased & I am unable to qualify for " best rate '' from my lender to purchase a new car.
